sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO order_audit (order_id, event, detail, reg_date) VALUES (#orderId#, #event#, #detail#, #regDate#)
INSERT INTO notification_outbox (member_id, channel, template, payload, sent_yn, reg_date) VALUES (#memberId#, #channel#, #template#, #payload#, 'N', #regDate#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT audit_id, order_id, event, detail, reg_date FROM order_audit WHERE order_id = #orderId#
